query_normalized: collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-policy distillation computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for multi-teacher knowledge distillation, which is a core mechanism component of the user's research question. While it doesn't address the LoRA-specific aspect, literature reviews cite partial-match papers that establish the distillation framework being applied, even when the parameter-efficient fine-tuning component (LoRA) is studied separately.
